meaning: of the heavens (possessed by فاطر - Creator)
messengers (as the ones being appointed by جَاعِلِ)
in pairs, two by two (with emphasis)
and in groups of four (connected to مَّثْنَىٰ وَثُلٰثَ)
he increases (subject of يَشَآءُ - what he wills)
Allah (as the object being praised in this verse)
upon, on, over (preposition showing authority over كُلِّ شَىْءٍ - everything)
whatever/that which (referring to Allah's mercy in يَفْتَحِ)
any great act of kindness and care (that comes from اللَّهُ)
one who holds back (negates رَّحْمَةٍ - mercy)
and whatever (relates to يُمْسِكْ - He withholds)
The Mighty One (a name/attribute of اللَّهُ)
all of you remember! (command to اسُ/people)
of Allah (object of غَيْرُ - other than)
other than (subject of يَرْزُقُكُم - provides for you)
he provides you all (with sustenance from اللَّهِ)
from the sky (connected to يَرْزُقُكُم - provides for you)
god/deity (object of لَا meaning 'there is no')
he (subject of يَرْزُقُكُم - provides for you)
so how? (connects to يَرْزُقُكُم - provides for you)
they deny/reject you (referring to Prophet Muhammad ﷺ)
messengers (as the subject of كُذِّبَتْ - were denied)
before you (referring to Prophet Muhammad ﷺ)
let (it) surely deceive you all (referring to الْحَيَوٰةُ الدُّنْيَا - worldly life)
he will surely deceive you all
the one who constantly deceives (subject of يَغُرَّنَّكُم)
the devil (as the object of إِنَّ)
so take him (all of you) (as عَدُوًّا/an enemy)
so that they become (purpose of يَدْعُوا۟ - he calls)
of the companions (of السَّعِيرِ - the Blaze)
the blazing fire (that the companions of الشيطان will enter)
for them (referring to الَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ - those who disbelieved)
very intense (describing عَذَابٌ/punishment, in a general sense)
and those who (connected to كَفَرُوا۟ in previous ayah)
for them (refers to الَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ - those who disbelieved)
for him (connected to زُيِّنَ - was made attractive)
evil (subject of زُيِّنَ - was made attractive)
and he saw it/him (referring to his evil deed that was mentioned before)
as beautiful/good (describing how something is seen)
Allah (the direct object of يُضِلُّ - He misguides)
he makes (others) wander off the right path
who/whoever (subject of يُضِلُّ - He leads astray)
and he shows the way (connected to يُضِلُّ - he misguides)
whoever (object of يُضِلُّ - He leads astray)
your self (as the subject of تَذْهَبْ)
The One True God (object of إِنَّ - indeed)
they make/create (referring to those who do evil deeds)
He (Allah) caused to be sent (the winds)
and then it stirs up (the winds stir up سَحَابًا clouds)
clouds (being stirred up by الرِّيٰحَ - the winds)
and then we drove it (the clouds to a dead land)
to a land/territory (that is dead مَّيِّتٍ)
and then we gave life (to الْأَرْضَ/the earth)
with it/by it (referring to the rain-cloud in سَحَابًا)
the earth (object being affected in this ayah)
the strength/honor (subject of belongs to اللَّهِ)
all together/completely (describes how العِزَّةُ belongs to Allah)
he rises upward (subject of الْكَلِمُ الطَّيِّبُ - good words)
and the righteous deed (subject of يَرْفَعُهُۥ)
he lifts it up (referring to العمل الصالح - the righteous deed)
they plot/are plotting (refers to those who plot evil in this ayah)
and plotting (subject of يَبُورُ - will perish)
those (referring to the people who plot evil mentioned before)
he/it (referring to مَكْر/plot in this ayah)
And God (as the doer of خَلَقَكُم - created you)
from/of (showing dust/soil as the source of creation)
from/out of (shows تُرَابٍ is the source material)
from a drop (connected to مِن before it)
then/after that (connecting خَلَقَكُم with what follows)
pairs/mates (as the object of جَعَلَكُمْ - made you into)
from (showing the origin/source of خَلَقَكُم - your creation)
with His knowledge (referring to Allah's knowledge)
from (connecting تُرَابٍ 'dust' to خَلَقَكُم 'He created you')
is being decreased (from عُمُرِهِۦٓ - his age)
that (pointing to something far) (refers to what was mentioned about Allah's knowledge)
of Allah (possessed by/connected to what comes before)
becomes equal/level by itself (referring to البَحْرَانِ - the two seas)
its drink (referring to this fresh water)
and this (referring to the salty sea mentioned after)
and from (connects to تَأْكُلُونَ - you eat)
and you see (the ships in the sea)
in it (referring to الْفُلْكَ - the ship)
so that you all seek (to seek from فَضْلِهِۦ - His bounty)
and so that you may (connected to تَشْكُرُونَ)
he causes to enter (the night into the day)
the night (object of يُولِجُ - he makes enter)
the day (object of يُولِجُ - He makes enter)
the daytime (object of يُولِجُ - He makes enter)
and he made (something) serve a purpose (connected to يُولِجُ - he causes to enter)
for an appointed time (relates to يَجْرِى - runs/moves)
Allah (the subject of يُولِجُ - He merges)
you all call upon/pray to (those you worship besides Allah)
a thin membrane (on a date pit)
you call them (connected to لَا يَسْمَعُوا۟ - they do not hear)
they hear/listen (referring to false deities who cannot hear prayers)
your prayer/supplication (object of يَسْمَعُوا - they hear)
to/for you all (responding to دُعَآءَكُمْ - your call)
the resurrection (connected to يَوْمَ - Day of)
they reject/disbelieve (referring to false deities in this ayah)
he informs you thoroughly (object of مِثْلُ/like)
like, similar to (subject of يُنَبِّئُكَ - informs you)
the people (who are being addressed in يٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلنَّاسُ - O people!)
And Allah (as the doer of what follows)
The Praiseworthy One (a name of Allah, subject of the sentence)
he wills (subject of يُذْهِبْكُمْ - he will remove you)
he takes you all away (after إِن يَشَأْ - if He wills)
and he comes/arrives (shortened because of إِن before it)
and not (negates ذٰلِكَ عَلَى ٱللَّهِ بِعَزِيزٍ)
that (pointing to something far) (subject of عَزِيزٍ)
difficult/hard for (in context of وَمَا ذٰلِكَ عَلَى ٱللَّهِ - and that is not for Allah)
her burden (referring to the heavily burdened soul مُثْقَلَةٌ)
it is carried (something that لا happens to)
from it (referring to the burden mentioned in حِمْلِهَا)
this/that (pointing to something near) (object of كَانَ)
those who (plural, referring to those who fear their Lord)
they fear (referring to those who fear their Lord in private)
their lord (the one who nurtures and cares for them)
with/by the unseen (what they cannot see)
for/then only (connects to يَتَزَكَّىٰ - purifies himself)
he becomes equal (negated by ما before it)
the blind one (being compared to البَصِير)
and the one who sees well (contrasted with ٱلْأَعْمَىٰ/the blind person)
and not (connects the negation of ٱلظُّلُمٰتُ to what came before)
the hot wind (contrasted with ٱلظِّلُّ/the shade)
Allah (as the object of يُسْمِعُ - makes hear)
he causes to hear (subject of اللَّهَ)
you (when speaking to one male person)
we sent you (as a messenger to people)
with/by the truth (describing how أَرْسَلْنٰكَ was done)
a bearer of good news (object of أَرْسَلْنٰكَ - we sent you)
and a warner (object of أَرْسَلْنٰكَ/We sent you)
a warner (in this ayah: one of two roles mentioned with بَشِيرًا)
then certainly (connects to يُكَذِّبُوكَ - they deny you)
before them (refers to those who denied the messengers)
she came to them (their messengers came to them)
their messengers (referring to the previous nations mentioned)
so how (asking about Allah's punishment after telling what happened to the disbelievers)
Did not...? (expecting yes) (connects to تَرَ - you see)
you see (after أَلَمْ which makes it past tense)
he sent down (Allah is sending down rain)
water (object of أَنزَلَ - He sent down)
and so we made (something) exit (referring to bringing forth ثَمَرَٰتٍ fruits)
with it/by it (referring to مَآءً water)
of the people (after مِنَ/from in this ayah)
from (connecting عِبَادِهِ 'His servants' to what came before)
indeed/truly (emphasizes that اللَّهَ is عَزِيزٌ غَفُورٌ)
Most Forgiving (as a general attribute of اللَّه)
those who (subject of يَتْلُونَ - they recite)
they recite (subject of يَرْجُونَ - they hope)
book, scripture (object being recited from يَتْلُونَ)
from what (of رَزَقْنٰهُمْ - We provided them)
secretly (describes how something is done in أَنفَقُوا۟ - they spent)
and openly (describing how they spent in أَنفَقُوا۟)
they hope (referring to those who recite)
a trade/commerce (as object of يَرْجُونَ - they hope for)
so that he pays them in full (their rewards)
their wages (object of لِيُوَفِّيَهُمْ - so He may give them in full)
indeed he (referring to Allah being غَفُورٌ شَكُورٌ - forgiving and appreciative)
Most Forgiving (as a general attribute of Allah)
very thankful (describing Allah in this ayah)
to you (object of أَوْحَيْنَآ - we revealed)
confirming/verifying (describing the Quran's role in confirming previous scriptures)
indeed/verily (emphasizes that اللَّهَ is خَبِيرٌۢ بَصِيرٌ)
with His servants (referring to Allah's servants)
indeed (He is) deeply aware (of عِبَادِهِۦ - His servants)
then (connects to أَوْرَثْنَا - we gave inheritance)
We chose/selected (object of أَوْرَثْنَا - we gave inheritance)
from/of (connects عِبَادِنَا to what comes before it)
and then from them (referring to عِبَادِنَا - Our servants)
a wrongdoer (one of three types mentioned in this verse)
and from them (referring to عِبَادِنَا - Our servants)
a self-moderating one (in a list with ظَالِمٌ and سَابِقٌ)
with the good deeds (object of سَابِقٌ)
that (pointing to something far) (refers to الْفَضْلُ الْكَبِيرُ - the great bounty)
the bounty/favor (this is what is great)
they are being decorated (with أَسَاوِرَ - bracelets)
from/of (connects أَسَاوِرَ 'bracelets' to its material ذَهَبٍ 'gold')
of/made of (أَسَاوِرَ bracelets made of ذَهَبٍ gold)
and a pearl (object being adorned with in يُحَلَّوْنَ)
and they said (introducing what they said next)
the praise (subject of قَالُوا, belongs to اللَّهِ)
from us (referring to the people of Paradise speaking)
the sadness (that was removed from them)
Our Lord! (calling out to Allah in the ayah)
house/dwelling (object of أَحَلَّنَا - He settled us)
of the place of staying/residence (possessed by فَضْلِهِۦ - His favor)
from (connects فَضْلِهِۦ to what came before)
for/to them (refers to الَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ - those who disbelieved)
Hell (as the subject of يُقْضَىٰ - 'is decreed')
away from them (referring to الَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ - those who disbelieved)
like that (referring to the punishment described before)
they seek help by screaming (while in the Fire)
our caring Lord! (calling out with emphasis)
take us out! (crying out to رَبَّنَا)
we work (in response to رَبَّنَآ - our Lord)
righteous deeds/actions (object of نَعْمَلْ - we do)
other than/different from (describing what comes after it)
the one who/which/that (connects to نَعْمَلُ - we used to do)
we work/act (in response to رَبَّنَآ - our Lord)
and did not...? (questioning what came before in يَتَذَكَّرُ)
we give you all long life (command)
what (with emphasis, used in the question: 'what length of time?')
and he came to you all (object of جَآءَ)
the warner (subject of جَآءَكُمُ/came to you)
so taste! (command to many people, referring to the punishment mentioned before)
so what (connects to فَذُوقُوا۟ - so taste)
from (connecting نَصِيرٍ to the previous statement)
any helper/protector (in context: there is no helper for the wrongdoers)
of the unseen (possessed by عٰلِمُ - Knower)
with/of that which is (connected to الصُّدُورِ - the chests/hearts)
he/it (refers to Allah in this ayah)
the earth (location where خَلٰٓئِفَ/successors are placed)
so upon him (refers back to مَن كَفَرَ - whoever disbelieves)
his rejection (of truth) (subject of فَعَلَيْهِ - 'then upon him')
their lord (the one who cares for and guides them)
their rejection (of truth) (increases الْكٰفِرِينَ only in loss)
except (emphasizing the exception of كُفْرُهُمْ increasing مَقْتًا)
your partners (referring to many people being spoken to)
you all call upon (addressing multiple people)
what (asking about something in the ayah)
they created (referring to the false partners/شُرَكَآءَكُمُ mentioned earlier)
partnership (with Allah) [referring to شُرَكَآءَكُمُ (your partners) mentioned earlier]
or rather (questioning if شِرْكٌ is true)
from it (referring to the book mentioned in the ayah)
but rather (correcting what was said about شُرَكَآء/partners)
some of them (as subject of يَعِدُ)
except (what comes after إِلَّا is excluded from what was mentioned before)
as nothing but deception (object of يَعِدُ/promise)
they both (heaven and earth) move away
and if indeed (introduces a conditional statement with emphasis)
if (introduces a condition in وَلَئِن زَالَتَآ - 'and if they were to cease')
he held both of them (referring to السَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضَ - the heavens and earth)
indeed he/it (referring to Allah in this ayah)
he was (describing how Allah is حَلِيمًا غَفُورًا)
and they swore strongly (followed by بِٱللَّهِ - by Allah)
by/with Allah (object of أَقْسَمُوا - they swore)
if indeed (introducing the oath in أَقْسَمُوا)
he came to them (referring to those who swore by Allah)
a warner (who came to warn these people)
and when (connects to أَقْسَمُوا - they swore)
a warner (in the context of a messenger warning their people)
he increased them (referring to how their stubbornness increased)
aversion (as the object of زَادَهُمْ - increased them)
it surrounds and overtakes harmfully (subject of مَكْرُ)
the intensely evil/harmful one (subject of يَحِيقُ)
with/by his family (affected by يَحِيقُ - surrounds/encompasses)
and so, is it? (connects to يَنظُرُونَ)
they look/observe (referring to the disbelievers mentioned earlier in the ayah)
the first ones (object of يَنظُرُونَ - they look)
any changing/alteration (of Allah's way - referring to سُنَّتِ ٱللَّهِ)
you will find (in relation to سُنَّتِ ٱللَّهِ - the way of Allah)
And did they not (before يَسِيرُوا۟ - travel)
they move/travel (connected to أَوَلَمْ - 'Have they not')
so they may look/consider (connected to يَسِيرُوا۟ - they travel)
from (comparing them with those before them)
from them (referring to those who came before)
he/it was (describes how عٰقِبَةُ/the end result was)
so that he makes him powerless
and not (negates what comes after it)
he was (describes عٰقِبَةُ - the end result)
all-knowing (describing اللَّهُ as the predicate of كَانَ)
powerful (describing Allah in كَانَ عَلِيمًا قَدِيرًا - He was All-Knowing, All-Powerful)
Allah (the one true God who is the subject of يُؤَاخِذُ)
the people (emphasized) (object of يُؤَاخِذُ - takes to task)
they earned (what they did in بِمَا)
he left/abandoned (what Allah would leave on مَا تَرَكَ)
but, however (contrasts with previous statement about Allah taking people to task)
he delays them strongly (subject is اللَّهُ)
an appointed time/term (being acted upon by إِلَىٰٓ)
then indeed/for surely (connects to يُؤَخِّرُهُمْ - He delays them)
Allah (as the object of يُؤَاخِذُ - takes to task)
he was (describes the state of بَصِيرًۢا)
with His servants (referring to Allah's servants)
